one_time_description: Treaty Loan Forgiveness (Note 18) - non-recurring loan forgiveness income
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in multiple limited partnerships: 1054423 Fisheries LP, HFN Environmental Waste Disposal Services LP, Kleekhoot Gold LP, Nootka Insurance LP, Tsuma-as Tseafoods LP, Upnit Power LP. Loan receivable from Upnit Power LP at 4% per annum, $3,888,412 outstanding, maturing July 31, 2021.
notes: Prior period adjustment of ($225,163) applied to opening accumulated surplus (Note 16). Treaty Loan Forgiveness of $904,411 is a significant one-time non-recurring item. Six related-party limited partnerships accounted for using modified equity method. Net losses from business partnerships of $271,318 recorded. Accumulated surplus on balance sheet ($3,006,956) differs from statement of revenue/expenditures ($2,637,082) - difference may relate to non-financial assets presentation. Total government transfers estimated from Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council + Province of BC + DFO + BC First Nations Gaming + CMHC subsidies + First Nations Health Authority + CMHC RRAP + CMHC HIIFNIY + First Nation Education Steering Committee. ISC funding not separately identified in statements.
